text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
You can obtain Support Cards from the
Support Card Scout!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
A Support Card is a card used to assist
your trainees in Career.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
By selecting a deck of Support Cards,
you'll receive the aid of others around
Tracen Academy to help your trainee
along!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's try our hand at scouting
some Support Cards!
